signatureAbility.signatureDescription: The slipperiest quarterbacks are capable of exploding out of the pocket at the slightest sign of trouble. When they enter the zone, their scramble speed is increased.
Passers with this ability improve the catching prowess of all tight ends who are open on pass plays.
Passers with this ability have perfect accuracy on all throws outside the numbers (except on high/low throws).
While in the pocket, passers with this ability are almost guaranteed to evade the first sack attempt by a blitzing defensive back.
When playing at home, players with this ability can easily enter the Zone.
Midway through the fourth quarter in close games, players with this ability can easily enter (and remain in) the Zone.
Run Stuffers can singlehandedly disrupt an offense. When they enter the zone, this ability increases their win rate and block shed speed against one-on-one run blocks.
Defenders with this ability have a greater chance of forcing fumbles when landing Perfect Hit Sticks
Players with this ability are harder to knock out of The Zone
Defenders with this ability use faster, more dominant pass rush moves while rushing from the edge of the defense.
Defenders with this ability will frequently attempt and win impact blocks against receivers, tight ends, and running backs.
Defenders with this ability have an increased success rate when using conservative or diving tackles.
Receivers with this ability catch more consistently while catching passes less than 10 yards from the LoS.
Players with this ability will distract defenders for longer with their runoffs
Receivers with this ability catch more consistently while catching passes 10-20 yards from the LoS, inside the numbers
Some pass rushers intimidate quarterbacks with their sheer presence. When they enter the zone, they can apply significant pressure on quarterbacks even while engaged with blockers.
